use_when: Create one new agent skill or scaffold a skill package
excludes: Existing skill improvement, evaluation, validation, or router migration

use_when: Create progressive-disclosure help for a skill
excludes: Regular workflow creation or routine edits

use_when: Edit or improve one existing agent skill and its resources
excludes: Creation, review-only evaluation, naming, or compression-only work

use_when: Evaluate one existing agent skill without modifying it
excludes: Requested fixes, creation, naming, or compression-only work

use_when: Validate a skill's required fields and route structure
Consolidate related skills into one routing skill
excludes: Creating a regular skill, renaming, or unrelated edits

use_when: Select and load workflows for a routing skill
excludes: Routing architecture design or route-file validation

use_when: Migrate related skills into one routing skill
excludes: Unrelated skill changes or general asset editing

use_when: Validate routing correctness, structure, and context efficiency
